details.question: 每个支行有多少个账户？
details.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM accounts a JOIN branches b ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name
details.generated_sql:
SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(a.account_id) AS account_count
FROM branches b
LEFT JOIN accounts a ON b.branch_id = a.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_id, b.branch_name
ORDER BY account_count DESC;
